title: SWFSC Cloud Migration Workflows
text:
1 SWFSC Cloud Migration
This site documents cloud-based satellite data workflows developed for the NOAA CoastWatch West Coast Node / SWFSC ERDDAP migration.

title: SWFSC Cloud Migration Workflows
text:
1.1 What you’ll find here

Cloud Run data pipelines for satellite processing
End-to-end reproducible workflows
Examples of operational ocean data systems

title: SWFSC Cloud Migration Workflows
text:
1.2 Not sure where to start?

Explore the VIIRS NetPP workflow
Review architecture and deployment patterns
Browse code examples and templates

title: 2  VIIRS Net Primary Productivity Cloud Run Workflow
text:
2.1 Purpose
This chapter documents a cloud-based workflow for generating VIIRS net primary productivity products.
This workflow computes daily and monthly satellite-derived primary productivity products from VIIRS inputs using a containerized Cloud Run Job pattern.
crumbs: 2  VIIRS Net Primary Productivity Cloud Run Workflow

title: 2  VIIRS Net Primary Productivity Cloud Run Workflow
text:
2.2 Repository structure
The workflow follows a consistent template: configuration, deployment assets, processing scripts, and NetCDF templates.
NOAA20-netpp-CloudRun/
├── config/
│   ├── config.yml
│   └── requirements.txt
├── deploy_job.sh
├── Dockerfile
├── entrypoint.sh
├── scripts/
│   ├── control_viirs_netpp.py
│   ├── make_viirs_netpp.py
│   ├── control_viirs_netpp_monthly.py
│   └── make_viirs_netpp_monthly.py
└── templates/
    ├── nasa_noaa20_4km.cdl
    ├── nasa_noaa20_4km_month.cdl
    ├── nasa_snpp_4km.cdl
    └── nasa_snpp_4km_month.cdl
crumbs: 2  VIIRS Net Primary Productivity Cloud Run Workflow

title: 2  VIIRS Net Primary Productivity Cloud Run Workflow
text:
Codebase
The workflow is structured into modular components that support configuration, deployment, processing, and product generation.



config/


Runtime configuration and Python environment.



config.yml — sensor, GCS, API, and processing settings


requirements.txt — Python dependencies





deployment files


Top-level files used to build and run the Cloud Run jobs.


Dockerfile

entrypoint.sh — job mode selector


deploy_job.sh — build, deploy, and schedule jobs





scripts/


Processing and orchestration logic.


Daily products



control_viirs_netpp.py — daily run orchestrator


make_viirs_netpp.py — daily productivity generator



Monthly composites



control_viirs_netpp_monthly.py — monthly run orchestrator


make_viirs_netpp_monthly.py — monthly composite builder





templates/


CDL templates used to create NetCDF outputs.


NOAA-20



nasa_noaa20_4km.cdl — daily template


nasa_noaa20_4km_month.cdl — monthly template



SNPP



nasa_snpp_4km.cdl — daily template


nasa_snpp_4km_month.cdl — monthly template





project metadata


Documentation, licensing, and change tracking.



README.md — project overview


CHANGELOG.md — version history and workflow changes


LICENSE — license terms
crumbs: 2  VIIRS Net Primary Productivity Cloud Run Workflow
